hero.title: Source Direct. Zero Middleman.
hero.subtitle: Cargoo helps you easily order brand items, small electronics, and fashion directly from the source with zero hassle.

step1.title: Request Items
step1.desc: Send us a link or description of any product you want to source from China.

step2.title: Get Estimate
step2.desc: Our experts evaluate suppliers and provide a total landed cost quote.

step3.title: Quality Check
step3.desc: We order to our China hub, verify quality via video, and secure your goods.

step4.title: Direct Delivery
step4.desc: We handle all customs and delivery logistics straight to your doorstep.
